scripts.build: astro build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); try { fs.copyFileSync('public/_redirects', 'dist/_redirects'); } catch (e) {}"
scripts.deploy: astro build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); try { fs.copyFileSync('public/_redirects', 'dist/_redirects'); } catch (e) {}" && wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name=kongsian-web --commit-dirty=true
